content.en:
The Ancestral Holy Mountain, the third level.

Ye Tian came to a void, there was an ancient scroll here, and on the scroll was a door killing move.

"Participate in the killing move, in 10,000 years, you can practice a killing move, and you can pass the third level!"

A voice rang out.

It is definitely not easy to comprehend a killing move within 10,000 years.

Ye Tian took a look at it and found that these killing moves were all biased towards the Golden Dao, after all, everyone came to visit the Ancestor Tablet of the Golden Enlightenment, and people naturally had to assess the comprehension of the Golden Dao, so they set up these golden killing moves as a level assessment.

The so-called killing move is a move, just one move, and there is no spare strength after one move, it is not a complete domain technique.

The power of the killing move is even higher than that of the general domain technique, and it is indeed difficult to practice a killing move in 10,000 years.

Ye Tian knew very well that the passage of time here was different, so the time of cultivating here for ten thousand years, and the outside world would not be long in the world.

"Just choose this killer move - break the gold!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, he began to comprehend the gold-breaking killing moves, and with his understanding, he had completely practiced the gold-breaking moves in just over a hundred years.

When Ye Tianshi showed the gold break, the third level was passed.

After passing all three levels, Ye Tian came to the Ancestor Sacred Mountain and came to the Golden Ancestor Monument.

At this time, there were already more than a dozen geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain here.

When they saw Ye Tian, they were extremely angry.

"Guys from the Dark Sanctuary !!!!"

One after another, killing machines shrouded Ye Tian, but these people didn't make a move.

Because this is the ancestral holy mountain, you are not allowed to use your hands.

If anyone dares to do so, they will be expelled immediately, and this opportunity to participate in enlightenment will be lost.

It was not easy for them to be able to come in once, and the next time the Holy Gold Realm opened, they would have already broken through to the Domain Ancestor, and this place would have nothing to do with them.

Therefore, it is impossible for them to ruin their chances.

"Saint Endowment of the Dark Sanctuary, when you get out of the Ancestor Sacred Mountain, you will die!"

One of the Blessed Beings spoke.

Through the copying talent, Ye Tian knew who this guy was, it was the Holy Endowed of the Destruction Saint Clan, the Black Pupil Holy Son!

Moreover, this guy actually has two holy endowments on his body, one pupil type holy endowment: holy eye, and one ice holy endowment: ice!

The two holy endowments make his strength inevitably surpass that of ordinary saints, perhaps not much weaker than the lightly clothed saintess.

Of course, the premise is that he already has two consummation-level holy skills, otherwise he still can't beat the light-clothed saintess.

The Golden Ancestor Tablet is the most helpful to those who have cultivated the Golden Sacred Technique, but others can also use the Golden Ancestor Tablet to comprehend the Forbidden Dao or spy on a trace of the Ancestral Path, which has unimaginable benefits for future cultivation.

It is even of great benefit to them to comprehend the Golden Domain Technique, and they can easily cultivate a Golden Domain Technique to the consummation realm, and even hit the limit level.

In the Unified Realm, very few people were able to cultivate the Golden Domain Technique to the extreme level.

For example, Ye Tian has never encountered it now, but if there is a Returning Realm and cultivating a domain technique to the extreme level, his strength will also increase a lot.

This is also why these geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain want to enter the Golden Ancestor Tablet, although they don't know the Golden Divine Technique, they can cultivate the Golden Domain Technique!

Therefore, it is also an unimaginable opportunity for them to be able to visit the Ancestor Monument of the Golden Enlightenment.

There is a limit to the time you can spend on the Ancestral Monument of the Golden Enlightenment, and the time for each person to visit depends on how long they can hold on.

The longer you meditate, the greater the pressure, and if you can't hold on any longer, you'll be removed from the Ancestor Mountain.

Therefore, these geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain no longer paid attention to Ye Tian and continued to comprehend the Golden Ancestor Tablet.

Ye Tian also found a good position, sat cross-legged, closed his eyes and began to comprehend.

Rumble!!!!!

The waves of the Golden Ancestor Monument rippled out, and in Ye Tian's perception, it seemed to turn into a sea of gold.

He was in the midst of the Golden Ocean, which was formed by the power of the Golden Ancestor Tablet, which showed some of the characteristics of the Ancestral Path, although it was far inferior to the Golden Ancestor Method.

But for Ye Tian, it is still extremely profound, and it is difficult to comprehend.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Golden Ancestor Tablet, relying on the Golden Ancestor Tablet to comprehend the Golden Silk Holy Technique.

If you can comprehend the Golden Silk Sacred Technique to the perfection realm, it will undoubtedly be the best result.

Time passed slowly, and in just a few years, a person came to the Ancestor Holy Mountain, which attracted Ye Tian's attention.

"The Lady of Light Clothes!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

The light-clothed saintess also saw Ye Tian, and she was immediately extremely surprised.

She didn't expect Ye Tian to come to the Holy Gold Realm, she naturally had the place she wanted to go when she came to the Holy Gold Realm, and the Golden Ancestor Monument was just one of the treasures she wanted to come to.

The two didn't chat, the light-clothed saint sat down casually, and also began to comprehend the Golden Ancestor Monument.

Year after year.

In the blink of an eye, a million years have passed.

At this time, some geniuses in the Dark Destruction Domain couldn't hold on anymore and were moved out one by one.

And Ye Tianhe and the light-clothed saintess are still insisting.

In fact, Ye Tian also suffered a lot of pressure, as if a vast and boundless ocean of gold acted on his body, suppressing him, but he was still able to withstand it.

I have to say that the effect of the Golden Ancestor Tablet in assisting the Holy Technique of Enlightenment is actually better than that of the Ancestor Method.

Because the Ancestor Law is too profound, on the contrary, he doesn't understand it even more, and the Golden Ancestor Tablet is slightly easier to understand, and the Golden Ancestor Tablet has been transformed by the Ancestor, which itself is specially designed to assist in the cultivation of enlightenment, and it is a holy relic.

Therefore, with the help of the Golden Ancestor Tablet, it is naturally faster to comprehend the holy technique.

And just like that, millions of years have passed.

At this time, there are not many people who are still here to comprehend, except for a few new geniuses of the Dark Destruction Domain, the only geniuses who came in at the beginning are these saints.

The strength of the Blessed is so strong that it can withstand it for a long time.

And after millions of years of penance, Ye Tian has made great progress.

At this moment, his Golden Silk Saint Technique had reached the consummation realm, and he still wanted to continue to comprehend for a while, but unfortunately his progress was very slow and slow.

In desperation, Ye Tian gave up continuing to cultivate the Golden Silk Saint Technique, but he didn't want to waste the time in the future, so he created a domain technique by himself, after all, the holy technique could not be used for a long time, and it was not bad to have one more domain technique.

And the domain technique he created was the Golden Domain Technique, the Void Gold Slash Technique, which had a very powerful attack effect.

Because it is a self-created domain technique, coupled with the Golden Ancestor Tablet as an auxiliary enlightenment, his Void Gold Slashing Technique realm has improved rapidly.

In just a few hundred thousand years, this Void Gold Slashing Technique had been raised to the limit level.
